executives.name: Charlene Begley
executives.background: Ms. Begley served in various capacities at General Electric Company from 1988 to 2013, including as a Senior Vice President and Chief Information Officer. She currently serves on the boards of Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. and Nasdaq, Inc.

executives.name: Toni Townes-Whitley
executives.background: Ms. Townes-Whitley has served as our Chief Executive Officer since October 2023. Prior to joining SAIC, she served as President, U.S. Regulated Industries at Microsoft from 2018 to 2023. Before Microsoft, she was President of CGI Federal and held management roles at Unisys Corporation.
